get.description: Gets a list of audit logs for an account. Can be filtered by who made the change, on which zone, and the timeframe of the change.

schema.description: Finds a specific log by its ID.
Indicates that this request is an export of logs in CSV format.
Filters by the IP address of the request that made the change by specific IP address or valid CIDR Range.
Filters by the email address of the actor that made the change.

oneOf.description: Limits the returned results to logs newer than the specified date. A `full-date` that conforms to RFC3339.
Limits the returned results to logs newer than the specified date. A `date-time` that conforms to RFC3339.
Limits the returned results to logs older than the specified date. A `full-date` that conforms to RFC3339.
Limits the returned results to logs older than the specified date. A `date-time` that conforms to RFC3339.

schema.description: Filters by the name of the zone associated to the change.
Changes the direction of the chronological sorting.
Sets the number of results to return per page.
Defines which page of results to return.
Indicates whether or not to hide user level audit logs.

4XX.description: Get account audit logs response failure

get.description: Gets the current billing profile for the account.

Returns billable usage data for PayGo (self-serve) accounts.
When no query parameters are provided, returns usage for the current
billing period.
This endpoint is currently in beta and access is restricted to select
accounts.

200.description: Indicates PayGo account usage data was successfully retrieved.

get.description: Lists all turnstile widgets of an account.

parameters.description:
Filter widgets by field using case-insensitive substring matching.
Format: `field:value`

Supported fields:
- `name` - Filter by widget name (e.g., `filter=name:login-form`)
- `sitekey` - Filter by sitekey (e.g., `filter=sitekey:0x4AAA`)

Returns 400 Bad Request if the field is unsupported or format is invalid.
An empty filter value returns all results.
parameters.name: filter

bot_fight_mode.description:
If bot_fight_mode is set to `true`, Cloudflare issues computationally
expensive challenges in response to malicious bots (ENT only).

clearance_level.description:
If Turnstile is embedded on a Cloudflare site and the widget should grant challenge clearance,
this setting can determine the clearance level to be set

ephemeral_id.description: Return the Ephemeral ID in /siteverify (ENT only).

name.description:
Human readable widget name. Not unique. Cloudflare suggests that you
set this to a meaningful string to make it easier to identify your
widget, and where it is used.

offlabel.description: Do not show any Cloudflare branding on the widget (ENT only).

region.description: Region where this widget can be used. This cannot be changed after creation.

post.description:
Generate a new secret key for this widget. If `invalidate_immediately`
is set to `false`, the previous secret remains valid for 2 hours.

Note that secrets cannot be rotated again during the grace period.

invalidate_immediately.description:
If `invalidate_immediately` is set to `false`, the previous secret will
remain valid for two hours. Otherwise, the secret is immediately
invalidated, and requests using it will be rejected.

post.summary: Rotate Secret for a Turnstile Widget

Lists SCIM Group resources for the account. Returns both system groups (backed by Cloudflare permission groups, prefixed `cloudflare-v1-`) and custom user groups. Supports filtering by `displayName` using SCIM filter syntax.

schema.description: The 1-based index of the first result in the current set of list results. Values less than 1 are treated as 1.
Specifies the desired maximum number of query results per page.
SCIM filter expression (RFC 7644 Section 3.4.2.2). Only `displayName eq "value"` is supported.

post.description: Creates a new SCIM Group (user group) for the account. The `displayName` must not be empty and must not begin with `CF` (reserved for system groups).

delete.description: Deletes a SCIM Group (custom user groups only). System groups backed by Cloudflare permission groups cannot be deleted via SCIM. Returns 204 No Content on success.

schema.description: The group identifier for a SCIM Group resource. For system groups this is prefixed `cloudflare-v1-<permissionGroupTag>`; for custom user groups this is a UUID-style tag.
schema.title: SCIM Group Identifier

get.description: Retrieves a single SCIM Group resource by group ID.

schema.description: The group identifier for a SCIM Group resource. For system groups this is prefixed `cloudflare-v1-<permissionGroupTag>`; for custom user groups this is a UUID-style tag.
schema.title: SCIM Group Identifier

patch.description: Partially updates a SCIM Group via PATCH operations (RFC 7644 Section 3.5.2). Supports add, remove, and replace operations on `members`, `displayName`, and `externalId`. For system groups (prefixed `cloudflare-v1-`), only member management operations are supported.

schema.description: The group identifier for a SCIM Group resource. For system groups this is prefixed `cloudflare-v1-<permissionGroupTag>`; for custom user groups this is a UUID-style tag.
schema.title: SCIM Group Identifier

get.description: Returns the list of SCIM resource types supported by the Cloudflare SCIM service (RFC 7643 Section 6, RFC 7644 Section 4). Clients use this to discover available resource categories (e.g. Users, Groups) and their associated schemas. Query parameters are not supported on this endpoint.

4XX.description: List SCIM Resource Types response failure

get.description: Returns a single SCIM resource type by ID (RFC 7643 Section 6). Valid IDs are `User` and `Group`.

4XX.description: Get SCIM Resource Type response failure

get.description: Returns the list of SCIM schemas supported by the Cloudflare SCIM service (RFC 7643 Section 7, RFC 7644 Section 4). Clients use this to introspect the attributes of each resource type. Query parameters are not supported on this endpoint.
Returns a single SCIM schema definition by schema URI ID (RFC 7643 Section 7). Valid IDs are `urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:core:2.0:User` and `urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:core:2.0:Group`.

Returns the SCIM 2.0 Service Provider configuration (RFC 7643 Section 5). IdPs use this endpoint to auto-configure their SCIM integration with Cloudflare, discovering which optional features (patch, bulk, filter, etc.) are supported.

200.description: Get SCIM Service Provider Config response

4XX.description: Get SCIM Service Provider Config response failure

get.description: Lists account members as SCIM User resources. Supports optional filtering by `userName` (email) using the SCIM filter syntax (e.g. `userName eq "user@example.com"`). Pagination is controlled via `startIndex` and `count` query parameters per RFC 7644 Section 3.4.2.4.

schema.description: The 1-based index of the first result in the current set of list results. Values less than 1 are treated as 1.
Specifies the desired maximum number of query results per page.
SCIM filter expression (RFC 7644 Section 3.4.2.2). Only `userName eq "value"` is supported.

post.description: Provisions a new account member via SCIM. The `userName` field must be a valid email address and must match the primary email in `emails`. The account must be an Enterprise account with SCIM entitlements enabled.

get.description: Retrieves a single account member as a SCIM User resource by user tag.

schema.description: The user tag identifying a SCIM User resource (account member).
schema.title: SCIM User Identifier

patch.description: Partially updates a SCIM User via PATCH operations (RFC 7644 Section 3.5.2). Supports updating `userName`, `name.givenName`, `name.familyName`, and `active`. Setting `active: false` deprovisions the user (removes them from the account). For IdP compatibility, `emails[type eq "work"].value` is also accepted as an alias for `userName`.

schema.description: The user tag identifying a SCIM User resource (account member).
schema.title: SCIM User Identifier

put.description: Replaces a SCIM User resource (RFC 7644 Section 3.5.1). Fully replaces the mutable attributes of the user. Supports updating `userName`, `name`, `emails`, and `active`.

schema.description: The user tag identifying a SCIM User resource (account member).
schema.title: SCIM User Identifier

op.description: The operation to perform. Only `replace` is currently supported; `add` and `remove` are accepted without error but have no effect. Matched case-insensitively.

path.description: Attribute path targeted by this operation. When absent, `value` must be a singular complex attribute.

value.description: The value(s) for the operation. For `replace` without a path, this should be an object of attribute name/value pairs. For member path operations, this should be an array of member value objects.

iam_scim_user_name_object.description: The components of the user's real name.

familyName.description: The family name (last name) of the user.

formatted.description: The full name, including all middle names, titles, and suffixes as appropriate, formatted for display.

givenName.description: The given name (first name) of the user.

iam_scim_user.description: A SCIM 2.0 User resource representing an account member (RFC 7643 Section 4.1).

active.description: A Boolean value indicating the user's administrative status. Set to `false` to deprovision the user, removing their membership from the account.

displayName.description: The display name shown for the user. Falls back to formatted name or userName if not set.

emails.description: Always contains a single primary work email matching `userName`.

externalId.description: An identifier for the user as defined by the provisioning client (IdP). This value is stored and returned but not interpreted by Cloudflare.

groups.description: A list of group identifiers to which the user belongs. Includes both system group tags (prefixed `cloudflare-v1-`) and custom user group tags.

iam_scim_group.description: A SCIM 2.0 Group resource representing an account user group (RFC 7643 Section 4.2). May be a system group (backed by a Cloudflare permission group, read-only except for member management) or a custom user group (full CRUD).

displayName.description: A human-readable name for the Group.

externalId.description: Identifier for the Group as defined by the provisioning client (IdP).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Group, assigned by Cloudflare. System groups are prefixed `cloudflare-v1-<permissionGroupTag>`; custom groups use a UUID-style tag.

members.description: A list of members of the Group. Only populated for custom (Phase 2) groups on individual GET requests. Each member object contains a `value` (user tag) and optional `display` (email).

display.description: The display name (email) of the group member.

value.description: The user tag identifier of the group member.

iam_scim_group.title: SCIM Group

effect.description: Allow or deny operations against the resources.

iam_scim_user_replace_request.description: Request body for replacing a SCIM User (PUT). Only `schemas` and `userName` are required; other fields are optional.

active.description: A Boolean value indicating the user's administrative status. Optional; if omitted, the current value is preserved. Set to `false` to deprovision the user, removing their membership from the account.

displayName.description: The name of the user, suitable for display to end-users. If not explicitly set, falls back to the formatted name or userName.

emails.description: Email addresses for the user. If a primary email is provided, it must match `userName`.

externalId.description: An identifier for the user as defined by the provisioning client (IdP). This value is stored and returned but not interpreted by Cloudflare.

userName.description: Unique identifier for the user, equal to the user's email address.

iam_scim_user_replace_request.title: SCIM User Replace Request

example.name: Load Balancing: Monitors and Pools Read
Load Balancing: Monitors and Pools Write

scopes.description: Resources to which the Permission Group is scoped

currency.description: The monetary unit in which pricing information is displayed.

current_period_end.description: The end of the current period and also when the next billing is due.

current_period_start.description: When the current billing period started. May match initial_period_start if this is the first period.

frequency.description: How often the subscription is renewed automatically.

price.description: The price of the subscription that will be billed, in US dollars.

state.description: The state that the subscription is in.

maxResults.description: The maximum number of filter results per page.

bill-subs-api_rate_plan.description: The rate plan applied to the subscription.

currency.description: The currency applied to the rate plan subscription.

externally_managed.description: Whether this rate plan is managed externally from Cloudflare.

id.description: The ID of the rate plan.

is_contract.description: Whether a rate plan is enterprise-based (or newly adopted term contract).

public_name.description: The full name of the rate plan.

scope.description: The scope that this rate plan applies to.

sets.description: The list of sets this rate plan applies to. Returns array of strings.

iam_scim_schema_attr.description: An attribute definition within a SCIM schema (RFC 7643 Section 7).

canonicalValues.description: A collection of canonical values for the attribute.

caseExact.description: Indicates if the string attribute is case-sensitive.

description.description: A human-readable description of the attribute.

multiValued.description: Indicates if the attribute is multi-valued.

mutability.description: Indicates the circumstances under which the value of the attribute can be defined or redefined.

referenceTypes.description: A multi-valued attribute that indicates the SCIM resource types that may be referenced.

required.description: Indicates if the attribute is required.

returned.description: Indicates when an attribute and associated values are returned in response to a GET request or in response to a PUT, POST, or PATCH request.

subAttributes.description: Defines a set of sub-attributes when the attribute type is `complex`.

uniqueness.description: Indicates how the service provider enforces uniqueness of attribute values.

iam_scim_schema_attr.title: SCIM Schema Attribute

created_on.description: Timestamp for the creation of the user group

modified_on.description: Last time the user group was modified.

policies.description: Policies attached to the User group

access.description: Allow or deny operations against the resources.

policies.title: User Group Policies

iam_scim_user_list_response.description: SCIM ListResponse envelope for User resources (RFC 7644 Section 3.4.2).

itemsPerPage.description: The number of resources returned in this page.

startIndex.description: The 1-based index of the first result in this set.

totalResults.description: The total number of results matching the query.

iam_scim_user_list_response.title: SCIM User List Response

access.description: Allow or deny operations against the resources.

iam_scope.description: A scope is a combination of scope objects which provides additional context.

objects.description: A list of scope objects for additional context.

iam_resources.description: A list of resource names that the policy applies to.

url.description: The URL associated with the custom page.

iam_member_permission_groups.description: A set of permission groups that are specified to the policy.

iam_scim_schema_extension.description: An extension schema associated with a resource type.

schema.description: The URI of the extension schema.

iam_scim_schema_extension.title: SCIM Schema Extension

description.description: A short description of the custom asset.

name.description: The unique name of the custom asset. Can only contain letters (A-Z, a-z), numbers (0-9), and underscores (_).

size_bytes.description: The size of the asset content in bytes.

url.description: The URL where the asset content is fetched from.

email.description: The contact email address of the user.

status.description: A member's status in the account.

user.description: Details of the user associated to the membership.

email.description: The contact email address of the user.

two_factor_authentication_enabled.description: Indicates whether two-factor authentication is enabled for the user account. Does not apply to API authentication.

iam_scim_resource_type_meta.description: Metadata for a SCIM ResourceType resource.

location.description: The URI of the resource being returned.

resourceType.description: The name of the resource type of the resource.

iam_scim_resource_type_meta.title: SCIM Resource Type Meta

iam_permission_group_ids.description: A set of permission groups that are specified to the policy.

items.description: A named group of permissions that map to a group of operations against resources.

iam_permission_group_ids.title: Permission Group IDs

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

iam_scim_group_patch_operation.description: A single PATCH operation for a Group resource. Supports `add`, `remove`, and `replace` on `members`, `displayName`, and `externalId`.

path.description: Attribute path targeted by this operation. Use `members` to modify group membership. May also include a filter expression to target specific members, e.g. `members[value eq "userTag"]`.

value.description: The value(s) for the operation. For member add/replace operations, an array of member value objects. For `displayName` or `externalId` updates, a string value.

iam_scim_group_patch_operation.title: SCIM Group Patch Operation

BillingPeriodStart.description: Indicates the start of the billing period.

ChargePeriodEnd.description: Indicates the end of the charge period.

ChargePeriodStart.description: Indicates the start of the charge period.

ConsumedQuantity.description: Specifies the quantity consumed during this charge period.

ConsumedUnit.description: Specifies the unit of measurement for consumed quantity.

ContractedCost.description: Specifies the cost for this charge period in the billing currency.

CumulatedContractedCost.description: Specifies the cumulated cost for the billing period in the billing currency.

CumulatedPricingQuantity.description: Specifies the cumulated pricing quantity for the billing period.

PricingQuantity.description: Specifies the pricing quantity for this charge period.
